info.title: Shri BalaJi Dham HMS API
info.description: Hotel Management System REST API for Shri BalaJi Dham Hotel, Mathura. Provides endpoints for room management, bookings, guest management, financials, and more.

get.summary: List bookings with filters and pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by booking reference or guest name

get.summary: Get booking details with rooms, charges, payments
List guests with search and filters

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email, or phone

post.summary: Create booking from website (no auth required)

get.summary: List only available rooms (clean, active, not occupied)
Get room type details with features

sanctum.description: Paste the token from /auth/login response (without "Bearer" prefix)
